✦ Our Collections ✦

Crafted with Love & Legacy

👁 View Collection
Signature

Bengali Authentic Sarees

Handwoven masterpieces in Tant, Muslin, Katan, and Jamdani — each thread carrying the artistry of generations of Bengali weavers.

👁 View Collection
Everyday Grace

Cotton Blouses

Soft, breathable, and beautifully crafted cotton blouses designed for comfort without compromising on elegance. Available in all sizes and colours.

👁 View Collection
Comfort Wear

Cotton Nighties

Breathable printed cotton nightgowns in vibrant patterns — soft, comfortable, and crafted for peaceful nights in true Bengali style.

⚪
Sacred Adornment

Bengali Shakha

Traditional white conch shell bangles — the sacred symbol of Bengali marriage — crafted with purity and devotion, in all sizes and styles.

🔴
Divine Symbol

Bengali Sindur

Premium quality vermilion sindur in traditional Bengali containers — a symbol of love and auspiciousness, pure and vibrant in every shade.

🪷
Festive Ritual

Bengali Alta

Vivid red liquid alta to adorn feet during festivals, pujas, and weddings — an age-old Bengali tradition in rich, long-lasting formulas.

"In every weave, every vermilion hue, every shell bangle —
lies the beating heart of Bengali womanhood."
✦ Bongoshree — Celebrating Bengali Heritage ✦
✦ Why Choose Bongoshree ✦

Authenticity You Can Feel

Every product in our collection is carefully sourced from skilled artisans and traditional craftspeople across Bengal. We believe in preserving the heritage while making it accessible to every home.

  • 100% authentic, handpicked Bengali products
  • Direct from weavers and traditional craftspeople
  • Premium quality sarees in all price ranges
  • Pure shell shakha with traditional craftsmanship
  • Vibrant, skin-safe alta and sindur
  • Soft, breathable cotton blouses and nightwear
❝
Every piece I choose carries a piece of Bengal's soul — I handpick each one so that every woman who wears it feels the warmth of home.
D. Lovely Founder, Bongoshree
✦ Visit Our Store ✦

Come Experience
Bengal in Person

Walk into our store and feel the texture of every saree, try on the shakha, and take home a piece of Bengal's soul. We welcome you warmly.
